cards.translation: Belief in Allah, His angels, His books, His prophets, the Hereafter, and divine decree
The five daily acts of worship performed at prescribed times
Refraining from food and drink from dawn to sunset throughout Ramadan
Obligatory charity given by Muslims who possess wealth above the minimum threshold
The pilgrimage to Mecca, obligatory once in a lifetime for those who are able
The belief in the absolute oneness and uniqueness of Allah
Feeling remorse for one's sins and sincerely turning back to Allah
Calling upon Allah and making requests of Him
Enduring hardship and difficulty without complaint
Being thankful for the blessings and favours of Allah
